summary: On April 16, 2026, Rubicon operators reported 105 targets destroyed across the Donbas, Sumy, and Belgorod directions, including Ukrainian personnel, fixed-wing UAVs, and logistics routes. On April 17, they destroyed additional Ukrainian personnel, fixed-wing UAVs (including long-range types), mined logistics routes, and cooperated with Russian Aerospace Forces to strike UAV launch points. Combat footage showed FPV drones hitting Russian soldiers using motorcycles during assaults, killing a Russian soldier who attempted to fake surrender, and Ukrainian forces surviving an FPV attack in the Kostiantynivka direction, where a drone detector alerted them to the threat. Ukrainian electronic warfare was also observed interfering with FPV drones, forcing a landing within 15 seconds.
